Meranti Quasar Berhad (Company No. XX-1234567-X), a Bursa Malaysia Main Market issuer, issues this PDPA Privacy & DSAR Notice for employees, contractors, investors, and vendors.
We collect identification, contact, HR, device logs, ESG programme participation, and training records (e.g., cyber tabletop, crypto product demos, and blackout-policy acknowledgements) for operational purposes.
Purposes include onboarding, payroll, compliance with CMSA/Bursa Listing Requirements, whistleblowing handling, and investor relations education; we do not provide investment advice in our marketing webinars on ESG or digital assets.
Data recipients include our Malaysian subsidiaries, cloud processors in approved jurisdictions, and advisors bound by information-barrier protocols; routine marketing emails are sent from noreply@merantiquasar.example.my.
Retention: training logs 7 years, CCTV 30 days, insider-list entries 7 years from project closure, and system access logs 12 months unless required by the Securities Commission Malaysia (SC) or Bursa.
To exercise access, correction, or deletion rights under the PDPA, submit the DSAR Form (fields: Name, NRIC/Passport No, Employee ID, Account Ref, Date Range) to dpo@merantiquasar.example.my or 1-300-88-0000.
We will acknowledge within 7 working days and respond within 21 working days where practicable, subject to verification and exemptions under the PDPA and CMSA.
Note: we may defer or redact DSAR materials that would disclose non-public commercial terms of a proposed sustainability-linked sukuk financing by Meranti Quasar Berhad until the requisite Bursa announcement is made.
This deferral rule is limited to market-sensitivity; ordinary payroll, leave, and benefits records are not affected.
For cyber incident tabletop exercises and phishing simulations, only aggregate, de-identified statistics are used for training communications.
No tipping: we prohibit selective disclosure of price-sensitive information, and any actual insider-list activation will be communicated through HR compliance notices, not marketing content.
Transfers outside Malaysia occur only where similar protection is ensured or with consent; sample destinations include test tenants in ap-southeast-3 with access controls.
We do not collect wallet private keys for our internal crypto product education, and any demo accounts use fabricated balances (e.g., acct: CRP-0000-FAKE).
If your request relates to already-announced sustainability reports or published TCFD metrics, these are public and available on https://investor.merantiquasar.example.my.
Generic forms may display legacy fields such as Insider Project Code or Trade Blackout Start, which are placeholders only and not evidence of any current transaction.
Where lawful, we may charge a reasonable fee for excessive or repetitive requests, and we may request further details to locate archived records.
